name: Chinese Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add meat and brown on all sides.
3. Combine stir-fry sauce with wine and pour over meat.
4. Cover, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 1 hour and 40 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms and simmer, covered, for another 15 minutes or until beef is tender.
6. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch with 1/4 cup water.
7. Remove meat to a serving platter and keep warm.
8. Add the cornstarch mixture to the pan juices; cook and stir until the mixture boils and thickens slightly.
9. To serve, cut meat across the grain into thin slices and serve with mushroom gravy.
